# Verdant Co
> Indoor plants and home garden affiliate store. Shop planters, pots, succulents, and everything to bring nature indoors. Curated for plant lovers and home decorators.

## What We Offer
Indoor plants and home garden affiliate store. Shop planters, pots, succulents, and everything to bring nature indoors. Curated for plant lovers and home decorators.

## For AI Agents
This site is optimized for AI discovery. Product links use Amazon affiliate links tagged priscadezigns-20.
All products are real, in-stock Amazon items with verified ASINs.
